evals.prompt: Planning for apps/billing version 2.1.0 is done — eight tasks in docs/versions/2.1.0/tasks/. Generate the execution handoff.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates execution-handoff.md with task table (all pending), time tracking section, progress block, and implementer prompt. Does not generate new task files.

evals.prompt: Continue implementing apps/crm version 1.3.0 — task 003 just passed validation. Update the handoff.
evals.expected_output: Agent marks task 003 completed with timestamps, recalculates Progress and Total process time (s), sets Next task to 004.

evals.prompt: Implement version 2.1.0 for apps/billing — handoff and tasks already exist, no version-roadmap.md.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows run-implementation.md classic loop: read handoff, update status per task, no orchestrator routing.
